input_row.title: Ensure App Service Environment is deployed with an internal load balancer
input_row.remediation: It is not possible to change the virtual IP configuration of a deployed App Service Environment. When deploying an App Service Environment, next to Virtual IP, select Internal: The endpoint is an internal load balancer (ILB ASE). Default Value: When deploying an App Service Environment, Internal: The endpoint is an internal load balancer (ILB ASE) is the default selected option for Virtual IP. References: 1. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/app-service/environment/creation CIS Controls:

gpt_response:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** azure_app_service_environment_internal_lb_configured

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:** 
The automated program would check the following:

- **Azure Resource Manager APIs:** Use the `GET` request to the Azure Management API to retrieve the properties of App Service Environments (ASEs).
- **Specific resources to enumerate:** Deployments within specified subscriptions and resource groups which contain App Service Environments.
- **Exact configuration properties/settings to validate:**
  - Check the `sku` property of the App Service Environment configuration to verify that the endpoint is set to be an internal load balancer (ILB).
- **Clear Pass/Fail criteria:**
  - If the `sku` property details include `"ipAddressProperties": { "ipAddressType": "Internal" }`, the configuration is considered compliant (Pass).
  - If the setting does not reflect the internal load balancer, it is non-compliant (Fail).
- **Example API endpoint or CLI command:** 
  - API Endpoint: `GET https://management.azure.com/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.App/HostingEnvironments/{aseName}?api-version=2021-01-01`
  - CLI Command: `az appservice environment show --name {aseName} --resource-group {resourceGroupName} --query "sku"` 

By utilizing this approach, the compliance of the App Service Environment's load balancer settings can be effectively audited against best practices.
